title: Reading One Candle Alone
problem: A candle may look strong or weak, but without background it can be misleading.
fix: Always ask what happened before this candle and where it appears.

title: Assuming High Volume Means Buying
problem: High volume can be buying, selling, absorption, or climax.
fix: Judge the close and result after the high-volume bar.

title: Entering Before Confirmation
problem: Many VSA ideas fail because traders enter while the evidence is incomplete.
fix: Wait for next-bar behavior and define invalidation.

title: Forcing VSA Labels
problem: Traders name patterns to justify trades instead of reading evidence.
fix: Use the checklist: background, level, volume, spread, close, confirmation.
